description: Composition Olive shirt made of 100% cotton, has a slit neckline, full length buttoned placket, long sleeves with mid arm button tabs, buttoned cuffs and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash Care Hand or machine wash cold with a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron Get back to the basics with this shirt from scullers for her. A great choice for everyday wear, team it with a denim pencil skirt and heeled sandals for a stylish look. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33"
